title: Niko Oneshot Mini World Machine
description: This resourse pack adds an animated World Machine in form of Niko to your inventory.
body:
# **Optifine or Animatica is required!**

 **Animatica also needs OptiGUI!**


This ResoursePack adds animated World Machine from Oneshot to your inventory.<hr>
![Character under craft tablein inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4f40990df4379fe548498d188e607e3f7bf927b.png)
